title: Deliverable D5.3 Entomological proteins recovery and functionalisation (lab scale)
author: Peral, Carlota
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document gathers the data from laboratory trials performed by Tecnalia in Task 5.2 and Task 5.3, regarding the insect proteins extraction and protein downstream processes, within the framework of the European project INNOPROTEIN:  New sustainable proteins for food, feed and non-food bio-based applications  (HORIZON-JU-CBE-2022; project number 101112072). Focus on fungal proteins extraction, trials were performed to extract protein from Hermetia illucens and Tenebrio molitor biomass obtained in Task 4.1. Several technologies have been evaluated, including three phase partitioning (TPP), ultrasound-assisted (US), accelerated solvent extraction (ASE), ultraturrax assisted extraction (UT) and natural deep eutectic solvent (NADES). Two nitrogen-to-protein conversion factors (NPCF) were applied to calculate the protein content of the initial insect biomass (data used for determining protein recovery yield): the standard NPCF of 6.25 and a specific NPCF (Kpi) calculated individually for each biomass.
